name: dynamic-pricing
description: Fluctum — dynamic pricing solution for Medusa
author: u11d <hello@u11d.com> (https://u11d.com)

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: npm --prefix dynamic-pricing-plugin run test:unit && npm --prefix starter/backend run test:unit
scripts.plugin:build: npm --prefix dynamic-pricing-plugin run build && cd dynamic-pricing-plugin && npx --yes yalc push
scripts.lockfiles:generate: npm --prefix dynamic-pricing-plugin install --package-lock-only --workspaces=false --legacy-peer-deps --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix starter/backend install --package-lock-only --workspaces=false --legacy-peer-deps --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix starter/storefront install --package-lock-only --workspaces=false --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix starter/scaffold install --package-lock-only --workspaces=false --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix landing-page/www install --package-lock-only --workspaces=false --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix landing-page/form-handler install --package-lock-only --workspaces=false --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund
